description_long: This is a small, white ceramic cup with a rounded body and a single, sturdy handle. The front features a bold orange circle with the black letters 'SL' prominently displayed, giving it a distinctive branded appearance. The back of the cup is printed with the name 'Sam Kadrofske' in black text, adding a personalized touch. The surface is speckled with tiny dark spots, suggesting a handcrafted or artisanal finish. The cup has a slightly flared base and a smooth, glossy surface, typical of glazed ceramics. Its compact size and robust handle make it suitable for serving espresso or small beverages in urban cafes or kitchens.
description: A small, white ceramic cup with a handle, orange 'SL' logo on the front, and 'Sam Kadrofske' text on the back, featuring a speckled, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange 'SL' logo on the white, speckled surface and the handle on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle visible, showing the plain white, speckled ceramic surface without any text or logo.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the black 'Sam Kadrofske' text on the white, speckled surface, with the handle on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with only the plain, speckled white ceramic visible, no handle or text in sight.
